title: Gantt Chart Half-Day

posts.author: thaqiftaher (Thaqif Taher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I wanted to ask regarding Gantt Chart. Currently, we need to use the timeline column type. Is there any way we can specify half day ? Sometimes, we do have certain activity which only require half day effort.

I tried to search similar topic but i couldn’t find any. If you guys have any other workaround, I would really appreciate that as well.

posts.author: amessina (alexander messina)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to revive this. I would like my gantt charts to reflect tasks that only take a partial day instead of rounding up to 1 day
